[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10001000 2
1 00101101 4
2 01011000 3
3 01111110 6
4 00010000 1
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 10011010 4

12 21 00000000 a match 5 6
23 32 00001000 1

45 54 00001000 1

67 76 00010000 1 match 4
70 07 00010000 1 match 4

13 31 00000000 a match 5 6

71 17 00000000 a match 5 6

50 05 00011000 2
61 16 00000100 1
72 27 00010000 1 match 4

26 62 00011010 3
37 73 00000000 a match 5 6
